message:
fix(safety): checked arithmetic in SizeEstimate + negative DB value guard

src/pages/size.rs:
- Clamp raw i64 values from SQLite to non-negative before casting to
  u64 via .max(0), preventing wraparound on corrupted/negative rows
- Replace bare "as u32" cast on chunk_count with u32::try_from() that
  saturates to u32::MAX for extremely large inputs
- Replace unchecked arithmetic (AEAD overhead multiplication, encrypted
  size addition, total site size addition) with checked_mul/checked_add
  that return descriptive overflow errors instead of silently wrapping
- Add test_from_plaintext_size_handles_extremely_large_inputs() that
  exercises the u64::MAX input path and verifies chunk_count saturates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
